metadata.title: Georgia Rep. Mike Collins' campaign uses AI-generated deepfake of Senator Jon Ossoff in tight Senate showdown
metadata.description: A new political ad​ in Georgia's U.S. Senate race is raising concerns about the use of artificial intelligence in elections after Rep. Mike Collins' campaign released a deepfake video showing Sen. Jon Ossoff mocking farmers and defending a government shutdown.
metadata.keywords: Deepfake, Georgia, United States Senate, Politics, Artificial Intelligence, Jon Ossoff
